data.body:
WITH insurance, my meds cost me $5 or less.

Now that I’ve lost my insurance, I can’t afford a doctor’s appointment to get my prescriptions renewed, so I have no idea how much they cost.

I’m rationing until I run out or somehow manage to afford insurance again. 

What a great system we have here.
